REQUEST FOR PROPOSAL

Client: Civic Forms Lab
Contact: procurement@civicforms.example
Deadline: 2026-07-05
Budget: USD 18000
Payment terms: Net 30 after invoice approval.

Scope: design a private workflow for lead intake, proposal generation, contract review, and export.

Required deliverables:
- discovery brief
- implementation roadmap
- signed handoff checklist
- acceptance criteria matrix

Acceptance criteria: imported data is deterministic, exports include provenance, and staff can correct low-confidence fields.
